traits.label: Aversion to speculative US tech
traits.detail: Wealth from selling a precision-engineering firm; values tangible, mature businesses. Has a high psychological barrier to volatile US tech/AI equities and has repeatedly asked to stay out of 'Silicon Valley cloud bubbles'.

evidence.quote: keep our money in established global consumer staples and industrials. I want to sleep at night, not speculate on Silicon Valley cloud bubbles.
These abstract software and AI firms are valued on pure hype. It feels like the dot-com crash of 2000 all over again.
requested a strict flag to block any high-beta speculative asset classes, preferring blue-chip defensive names and sovereign bonds.

traits.label: Capital preservation & steady cash flow
traits.detail: Primary goals are preservation and predictable dividend/coupon income to fund the family foundation; prizes 'quiet, predictable, boring' performance.

evidence.quote: capital preservation and steady cash flow are his primary goals ... he only values tangible, mature businesses with proven global cash flows.
